description_long: This is an ornate, dual-armed candle holder featuring two tall, red taper candles. The base is square and robust, likely made of dark metal with a greenish marble or stone column rising from it. The arms are elaborately scrolled, with intricate wrought ironwork supporting the candle plates. The candle plates are wide and circular, designed to catch dripping wax, and the candles themselves are slender and unlit, with visible wicks. The overall design is classical and decorative, suggesting a vintage or antique style suitable for formal urban settings. The object exudes a sense of elegance and is likely intended as a decorative accent for upscale public or private spaces.
description: An ornate, dual-armed metal candle holder with two tall red candles and intricate scrollwork, set on a sturdy square base. The design is classical and decorative, with a greenish marble column and wide candle plates.
description_view_0: Side view showing one candle and the elaborate scrollwork arm, with the square base and marble column visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both red candles, symmetrical scrollwork arms, and the full width of the candle holder.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the other scrollwork arm and candle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing both candles and the back of the ornate arms, with the marble column and base visible.
